name: Process & Expectation Accuracy Judge
description: Did the agent state the scripted process facts correctly: website navigation, form requirements, and post-submission expectations (24 business hours, email sequence)?
judgePrompt: Score the accuracy and completeness of the agent's process guidance against the warranty script. Check: website navigation (greenbeanbattery.com > 'Warranty' top right > 'Submit a Claim'); form requirements when relevant (vehicle info, issue details, DTCs, photos, installer info); and post-submission expectations (confirmation email, then a second email with the claim number, allow at least 24 business hours, monitor email including spam). Penalize wrong/missing navigation, wrong timeline, or omitted email-sequence expectations where the path requires them.
